PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider, for Petitioner John Byrd.

Mr. Schneider stated that he had obtained a bond in the amount of $10,000.00. The Court asked for Counsel to make a showing that this amount would be sufficient. Mr. Schneider agreed to provide the Court with a supplemental declaration regarding the valuation of the estate's assets. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order and a satisfactory supplemental declaration re valuation of assets).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
